headings.usage: Use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight or tracking-tighter) for H1 and H2. Fluid typography scaling up to text-6xl for hero.

body.usage: Use leading-relaxed for body text. No generic fonts like Inter allowed for headings.

primary.description: Deep Navy Blue - the core banking identity.

accent.description: Premium Gold - for CTAs, highlights, icons, and borders.

rules: Tinted Grey Rule: No pure black or grey. Base colors on deep navy/slate.
Never use pure transparent backgrounds under content; always use the glassmorphism approach.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use 'backdrop-blur-xl bg-slate-950/70 border-b border-white/10' for the sticky header.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid border-white/10 to ground elements and cards.
visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle grain overlays or dark abstract gradients to remove digital flatness.

components.name: Navigation / Header
components.rules: Fixed top, z-50, backdrop-blur-xl with semi-transparent dark background (bg-slate-950/80). Must include Logo, Links, and a Gold 'Apply Now' CTA button. MUST NOT be fully transparent to ensure readability.

components.name: Hero Section
components.rules: Kinetic hero with on-load line-by-line text reveal animation (using framer-motion). Large Playfair Display typography. Background image with bg-slate-950/70 overlay to ensure text contrast. Include a numbered manifesto or floating badge.

components.name: Marquee
components.rules: One slow horizontal marquee showing 'BFSI Excellence - Top Placements - Industry Leaders' etc. Use react-fast-marquee.

components.name: Cards (Courses & Team)
components.rules: Dark surfaces with 1px border-white/10. On hover: slight upward transform (-translate-y-1) and subtle gold border glow or gold text shift. Use 16px to 24px padding.

components.name: Forms (Apply Now & Contact)
components.rules: Use Shadcn components for Input, Select, and Form where possible, or style standard inputs with Tailwind. Apply Now requires a file upload (input type='file'). Buttons should be premium gold (bg-[#D4AF37] text-black).

components.name: Footer
components.rules: Large padding (py-24). Deep dark background. Include all required details: Logo, contact +91 9288194815, email rivaledgeventuresinfo@gmail.com, location Patna, quick links, policies, social icons.

grids_layouts.bento: For courses, use a 3-column responsive grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3) with gap-8. Every pixel of the grid items utilized with h-full.

motion.scroll: Use lenis for smooth momentum scrolling.
motion.reveal: Framer-motion for section scroll-reveals (fade up, stagger children).
motion.micro: Hover states on buttons (scale 1.05 or background shift), links, and cards.

accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='apply-now-submit').
accessibility.contrast: Ensure white/gold text on dark blue meets APCA/WCAG ratios.

hero_background.description: Illuminated city skyscrapers of major banks in Singapore's financial district at night.

about_us.description: Students learning in a modern classroom setting.

team_marketing.description: Studio portrait of a smiling young man.

3d_libraries.usage: Use Framer Motion for all scroll reveals and the kinetic hero line-by-line reveal. Use Lenis for momentum scrolling.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install dependencies: framer-motion, @studio-freight/lenis (or lenis), react-fast-marquee, lucide-react, clsx, tailwind-merge.
Add fonts Playfair Display and Outfit via Google Fonts in public/index.html.
Setup Tailwind config (tailwind.config.js) using the colors provided in this JSON.
Ensure the Navigation Header has a glassmorphic background (e.g. bg-slate-950/80 backdrop-blur-md) and is NOT fully transparent.
Build the Apply Now form with file upload support (input type='file').
Ensure all sections from the problem statement are implemented: Hero, About Us, Courses/Programs, Our Team, Apply Now Form, Contact Us, Footer.
Include data-testid on every interactive element.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Break the mold. Layer your elements with z-index hierarchy and negative space.
Use glass-morphism to give a premium financial feel.
Do NOT apply 'transition: all' globally. Target specific properties.
Do NOT center align the app container in App.css or index.css.
Never use placeholder URLs. Use the provided image URLs or find relevant ones from lucide-react.
Add subtle hover micro-interactions to all cards and buttons.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
